title: Image To Image Premium Object Product Display AI
sourceTitle: Image To Image Premium Object Product Display AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image premium product-display transformation for an uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, preserving 请把这张普通物品照片改造成高级商品展示图。 exactly as the hero object. Subject: 请把这张普通物品照片改造成高级商品展示图。 keeps its original appearance, color, material, proportions, and main structure from the uploaded photo while being presented as a high-end product display. Scene: soft morning kitchen counter with a clean background, refined light, simple composition, and matte stone plinth with subtle linen backdrop that supports the object without overpowering it. Composition: Preserve the object identity and main shape, center it as the hero product, remove or soften visual clutter, create balanced 4:5 product-poster framing, and keep background elements secondary. Signature Elements: Uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, preserved 请把这张普通物品照片改造成高级商品展示图。, soft morning kitchen counter, matte stone plinth with subtle linen backdrop, clean premium background, refined light-shadow design, and uncluttered 4:5 product display. Fixed source details: Source Object Photo: ordinary ceramic pour-over set photo. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Keep the uploaded object color and material truth; Lighting: Polished studio-style product lighting with clean edge highlights, soft shadows, material-reflective detail, and realistic depth around the object. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Materials: Original object material remains intact, supported by premium surfaces such as stone, acrylic, wood, linen, metal, or matte plinth textures chosen through matte stone plinth with subtle linen backdrop. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
